_schema.doc: Canonical TC set list. set_id is the ptcg.tw URL slug under /expansions/<set_id>/cards. abbreviation matches the official TC set code printed on cards (often mirrors JP — e.g. SV1S). jp_equivalent_id maps to JP set codes from pokemon-card-jp-database. release_date is ISO 8601. Unknown fields use the literal string "VERIFY" until an operator confirms.
_schema.manual_curation: TC has no Ngansen GitHub fork — this file is hand-curated by the operator from ptcg.tw/expansions. Add new sets here as Pokemon Co Taiwan publishes them. Phase D will not auto-discover new TC sets; ZH-4 (zh_set_audit) compares this list against ptcg.tw/expansions and surfaces a 'new set seen upstream' warning.

sets.name_zh_tc: VERIFY (緋紅之凜 / Scarlet ex equivalent)
VERIFY (堇紫之蒼 / Violet ex equivalent)
